
curl 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1wbs/addStoryData'  \
 -H 'accept: application/json, text/plain, */*'  \
 -H 'accept-language: en-GB,en-US;q=0.9,en;q=0.8' \
 -H 'authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..kKulL51LrShNAGwnG-G6TzayvJWVQa8of9IEwf7WeCs' \
 -H 'cache-control: no-cache' \
 -H 'content-type: application/json' \
 -H 'origin: https://stage.oodleslab.com'  \
 -H 'pragma: no-cache'  \
 -H 'priority: u=1, i' \
 -H 'referer: https://stage.oodleslab.com/'  \
 -H 'user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/142.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' \
 --data-raw '{"week":"","description":"Description of the sprintId 78","remark":"","story":"","storyName":"","storyId":0,"ewh":0,"resource":"","sprintId":78,"weekId":[]}'




curl 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1wbs/getallSprintData?projectId=33&wbsId=15' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: en-GB,en-US;q=0.9,en;q=0.8' \
  -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' \
  -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
  -H 'Origin: https://stage.oodleslab.com' \
  -H 'Pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \

  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site' \

  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Linux"'
  
  
  
  
curl 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1wbs/updateSettingsResource?wbsId=15&projectId=33' \
  -X 'PUT' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: en-GB,en-US;q=0.9,en;q=0.8' \
